steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject is Barrada's pieces (plural noun), separated from the blank by a participial phrase modifier. The blank is followed by the ways humans attempt to organize and regulate nature, a direct object. This creates a subject-verb-object structure.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Explore is the correct choice because it's the plural present form required by subject-verb agreement. The other choices violate this rule by using singular verb forms (B and C) or a non-finite participle (D). That confirms A is correct.
